llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V, corresponding to about 97.43 decades.

Local reversals appear at larger |V|, for example on the positive branch |I| changes from 1.8563767293971126e-05 A at 5.45 V down to 1.795139225310024e-05 A at 5.50 V and 1.2995820311170867e-05 A at 5.55 V before rising again.
At small |V| the magnitudes are extremely low: |I| is 8.897350992969297e-103 A at -0.1 V and 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V, increasing to about 10^-54 A by |V|=0.2 V.
